manual.page_subtitle: When auto-parsing is unavailable, fails, or misses figures, you can select regions directly on PDF pages.
manual.fulltext_status_empty: No full text saved yet. Click the button to extract and save for AI Reader and search.
manual.workspace_hint: Press and drag on the page to create a selection region.
manual.page_figures_empty: No extracted figures on page {page} yet.
manual.sidebar_desc: You can select across pages. Submitted figures are appended and won't overwrite existing ones.
manual.err_no_pdf_url: This paper has no PDF file URL
manual.err_load_failed: Unable to load this paper. Please go back to the library and try again.
manual.err_selection_too_small: Selection area too small, please try again
manual.err_no_selection: Please select at least one region first
manual.err_no_text_extracted: No usable text extracted from this PDF
manual.err_render_failed: PDF page rendering failed. Please try again later.
manual.msg_page_hint: Currently on page {page}. Drag to add selections, add captions on the right and submit.
manual.msg_page_hint_with_figures: Currently on page {page}. {count} extracted figure(s) are shown for direct reference before you add more selections.
manual.msg_default_subtitle: Select figure regions on the page. Submitted figures are appended to this paper.
manual.msg_confirm_clear_page: This will remove {count} selection(s) on page {page}.
manual.msg_confirm_clear_all: This will clear all pending selections for this paper.
manual.fulltext_status_has_text: Full text saved ({count} characters). You can re-extract to overwrite. Used for AI Reader, search, and organization.
manual.fulltext_extracting_page: Reading page {current} / {total} and saving to this paper.
manual.fulltext_extracting: Extracting full text from this PDF.
manual.empty_desc: Navigate to a page and drag to create selections. They will appear here for submission.
manual.selection_caption_placeholder: Optional, saved as figure description after submission
